args.query: SELECT gmap_id, name, description FROM business_description WHERE description ILIKE '%Los Angeles, CA%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT gmap_id, name, description FROM business_description WHERE description ILIKE '%Los Angeles, CA%';

args.query: SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_count FROM review WHERE gmap_id IN ('gmap_44','gmap_41','gmap_43','gmap_38','gmap_39','gmap_42','gmap_40') GROUP BY gmap_id ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql: SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_count FROM review WHERE gmap_id IN ('gmap_44','gmap_41','gmap_43','gmap_38','gmap_39','gmap_42','gmap_40') GROUP BY gmap_id ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC LIMIT 5;

args.code:
import json, pandas as pd

biz = pd.DataFrame(var_call_lhpltCb6owtix3cwSNp8yTGC)
rev = pd.DataFrame(var_call_aKEospzzrIHnwaJliiqVoN3y)
rev['avg_rating'] = rev['avg_rating'].astype(float)
rev['review_count'] = rev['review_count'].astype(int)

df = rev.merge(biz[['gmap_id','name']], on='gmap_id', how='left')
df = df.sort_values(['avg_rating','review_count','name'], ascending=[False, False, True]).head(5)

out = df[['name','avg_rating']].to_dict(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))
